content: Laravel 11.x official docs (eloquent-relationships): belongsToMany()->withPivot('col1','col2') exposes extra pivot columns via $model->pivot->col; wherePivot()/wherePivotIn()/wherePivotNull() filter by pivot column; withPivotValue() both filters AND sets a default on create; withTimestamps() for pivot created_at/updated_at; ->as('alias') renames the pivot accessor (e.g. ->as('enrollment') instead of the default 'pivot'); ->using(CustomPivot::class) attaches a full Pivot-extending model when the pivot needs its own behavior/casts (e.g. casting a status column on the pivot itself). Directly supports subject_user (lecturer<->subject) and an enrollments pivot/table with a status enum column.
